title: WSET Knowledge Map — Concept
description: An atomic, independently teachable unit of WSET L3 knowledge. Concepts are the primary nodes of the knowledge graph.

concept_id.description: Stable unique identifier. Format: C_{SLUG} — e.g. C_ACIDITY, C_TANNIN_POLYMERISATION

topic_id.description: topic_id of the parent topic this concept belongs to.

definition.description: Precise, technically correct definition of the concept. Must not contain vague or marketing language.

common_misconceptions.description: List of misconception_ids referencing records in ../misconceptions/.

distinction_insights.description: Key insights that separate a Distinction-level understanding of this concept from a Pass-level understanding.

cause_effect_links.description: List of chain_ids referencing causal chains in ../causal-chains/ where this concept is a factor.

related_grapes.description: Grape variety slugs that are strongly associated with this concept.

related_regions.description: Region slugs strongly associated with this concept.

related_wine_laws.description: Wine law slugs relevant to this concept.

official_reference.description: Primary official WSET source reference for this concept. Null if no direct official reference identified.

tutor_allowed.description: Whether the Tutor Agent may draw on this concept in pedagogical responses. Almost always true.

examiner_allowed.description: Whether the Examiner Agent may reference this concept. True only if the concept is directly grounded in official WSET material (trust tier 0-1).
